◎简　　介  

　　The Movie Show is SYFY's new comedy series set inside a public access movie review show that tapes deep in the heart of Modesto, California. The Movie Show is hosted by polar opposites, Deb and Wade, who have nothing in common other than their shared love of movies and the fact that they're both puppets.
